title: Mirror Manifest Schema
description: Defines the required structure for all mirror manifests in the Construction OS integration mirror system. Every mirror must have a valid manifest conforming to this schema.

mirror_id.description: Unique identifier for this mirror. Must be globally unique across all mirrors in the registry. Format: lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

mirror_name.description: Human-readable name for this mirror. Used in documentation, logs, and governance records.

source_system.description: Identifier of the external source system that this mirror reflects. Must reference a known system in the source system registry.

trust_boundary.description: Reference to the trust boundary definition governing this mirror's interaction with Construction OS core. Must reference a documented trust boundary specification.

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the mirror. Transitions between states are governed and must follow the mirror lifecycle model.

enabled_slices.description: List of capability slices currently enabled in this mirror. Each slice must be declared with its identifier and operational status.

slice_id.description: Unique identifier for the capability slice within this mirror.

transfer_class.description: Transfer classification for this slice, determining what forms of external handoff are permitted.

dependencies.description: List of slice_ids that this slice depends on.

version.description: Semantic version of this mirror manifest. Incremented on every manifest change.

created_at.description: Date when this mirror was originally created (chartered). Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

owner.description: Identifier of the team or individual responsible for this mirror's governance and operation.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this mirror's purpose and scope.

charter_reference.description: Reference to the governance charter document that authorized this mirror's creation.

last_parity_review.description: Date of the most recent parity review for this mirror.

breakaway_conditions.description: Declared conditions under which this mirror should undergo breakaway.

threshold.description: Measurable threshold that triggers this condition, if applicable.

truth_ownership_references.description: References to truth ownership matrix entries relevant to this mirror.

registry_entry_id.description: Reference to this mirror's entry in the central mirror registry.

updated_at.description: Date of the most recent manifest update.
